case_title: TOMMY C. FONG VS. ANNE COLLINS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AS TO ANNE COLLINS AND ALL OCCUPANTS IN CASE OF THE NAMED DEFENDANT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, ANNE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG, TOMMY C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLINS, ANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1846-A 9TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, TOMMY C. AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, ANNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, TOMMY C. SERVED JAN-27-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, ANNE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, ANNE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, ANNE
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, ANNE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $53.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, TOMMY C.

DECLARATION TOMMY C. FONG FILED RE: UNAVAILBLE ORIGINAL AGREEMENT (IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY CLERK) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, TOMMY C.
